name: Guarding
short: +2 to Defense Dice rolls until the next time this monster activates (or the end of the Round, whichever comes first).

name: Rested
short: Has used the Rest action this Round (limit once per Round; Rest grants +2 Energy).

name: Last Life token
short: Was saved by the Last Life ability. Cannot be targeted by Last Life again this game.

name: Bond strained
short: Separated from its Bonded partner by more than 2": -2 to all Attack Dice rolls and +2 to all Emotional Instability tests until back within 2".
